RGNet.architecture_summary: Practical approximation with EfficientNetV2B0 feature backbone, dense cosine-similarity graph construction with softmax normalization, and lightweight residual graph-convolution blocks.
RGNet.missing_relative_to_paper: Paper uses specific region proposals instead of dense similarity, and a different backbone (usually ResNet/VGG). Also misses AVA classification task.

A-LAMP.architecture_summary: Practical approximation with EfficientNetV2B0 global branch and explicit coordinate layout cues, combined with MobileNetV2 multi-patch branch and learned patch importance weighting.
A-LAMP.preprocessing: Global view uses LayoutCueAugmentation (meshgrid coordinates and valid mask). Patches cropped via heuristic search.
A-LAMP.missing_relative_to_paper: Adaptive layout-aware structure explicitly encoding spatial relationships, VGG16 shared backbone, object/attribute graph construction. Also misses AVA classification task.
